programmes.show_description: The Young Parent Trap: Lois and Peter are mistaken for young parents at Stewie's school and are invited to live in a millennial apartment complex, leaving Meg and Chris home alone.
Dr. Sunderson's Sunsuckers: US animated comedy series. Hayley and Jeff help one of Roger's personas run a solar company.
Comb Over: A Hair Piece: US animated comedy series. Stan does something about his secret baldness and gets the help of Josay Bosay, Roger's famed hairstylist-to-the-stars persona.
Fight at the Not Okay Chore-Ral: Animated comedy. The Belchers end up in a bedtime story showdown when Bob and Linda suggest that the kids should take on more household chores.
Radio No You Didn't: Animated comedy. The unearthing of an old radio in Bob and Linda's bedroom cupboard leads Bob to tell his family a story of Second World War espionage.
Lindsey joins Stephen Mulhern as she goes up against the Banker and tries to open the right boxes in the right order to avoid joining the infamous 1p Club.

Feline Lucky / A Prickly Pair: Animated series. Sylvester is all in when he spots Tweety Bird in a casino, and Beaky Buzzard learns that love can hurt.
Wrong with the Wind / Pigs' Feet / Moody at the Movies: Animated series. Porky wishes people would 'leaf' him alone, Daffy performs a magic 'feet', and a family of bears ruin a film.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. The Titans' antics with their imaginary friend Captain Cool annoy Robin until make-believe starts becoming real.
Halloween: Animated adventure series. The gang goes trick or treating on Halloween night, but the experience goes wrong when Fred runs into a witch that he met before 11 years ago.

programmes.show_description: Reality series. Christmas has come early for the Shepherds as they do their first photo shoot as a family of five, but things grind to a halt as Arthur goes AWOL.
The cast jet off to Portugal for sun, sea and drama as Dan and Ella are reunited for the first time since their break-up and Freddie sends messages that cause tension in the group.
Reunion Part Three: US reality series. The ladies revisit their iconic trip to Mexico City before an unexpected guest closes out the reunion with a surprise performance.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Beachy Keen: US reality series. Garcelle invites the ladies to her beach house, but a rude interruption on the way there causes Dorit to take pause with Sutton.
Ant and Dec are back and trying to give away the biggest cash prize in TV history - competitive father-and-daughter duo David and Emma hope that this will be to their benefit.
Support worker Kerrick and coach driver Declan, rail engineer Ricky and civil servant Sarah, and revenue inspector Sadiq and civil servant Shabina try to win 50,000 pounds.
Everyone is hoping for a relaxing time as some of the group head out on a boat to celebrate Amy's birthday while the rest of the gang have a pool day, but the peace doesn't last.
No Woman Is An Island: Reality series. The friendship retreat is in full swing with safaris, cooking and island hopping, but things don't stay harmonious for long.
The Moore the Merrier: US reality series. Porsha and Dennis's relationship hits a rough patch, while Kenya relishes her new role as mother to daughter Brooklyn.

Husband-and-wife team Kevin and Efe ride their luck to try to win life-changing money on the Limitless Ladder, but their dreams for great goals are soon hanging in the balance.

Live, Laugh, Love: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter tries to make Joe laugh when he realises that he has never found him funny, and Lois chaperones a school trip for Chris and Meg.
V Is for Mystery: Stewie and Brian solve a series of mysterious murders in Victorian London in a homage to Charles Dickens.
Meg Goes to College: Meg is admitted to Brown University, but after being suspended for her application being a fraud, has to prove she deserves to be there.
Family Time: US animated comedy series. Stan and the family go out to dinner at a buffet restaurant, and Roger becomes a flower.
Plot Heavy: When Stan sells off the coveted family plot, the Smiths open their own cemetery in their backyard with the help of a basketball Hall of Famer.
The Amazing Rudy: Animated comedy. Bob and Linda get a chance to see how kind Louise can be when an embarrassed Rudy runs away from a monthly dinner with his divorced parents.
Mother Author Laser Pointer: Animated comedy. Linda's anxieties over the children growing up cause her to obsessively harass a famous children's book author to the point of terror.

Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Robin teaches the other Titans about the art of concealment through a game of hide and seek.
